name: Illusory Realm of the Blazing Sun

anomaly.name: Confinement
anomaly.effect: Ally targets initially obtain <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>2</unbreak></color> stack(s) of this effect, with each stack decreasing their own DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.1%</unbreak></color>. This effect cannot be dispelled, and 1 stack is removed after each Ultimate used.

anomaly.name: Depowered
anomaly.effect: When entering combat, reduces ally target's Energy by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.5%</unbreak></color> and decreases their Energy Regeneration Rate by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.5%</unbreak></color> outside of their turn for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>2</unbreak></color> turn(s).

anomaly.name: Taunting+
anomaly.effect: Enemy target takes immediate action after being attacked <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>5</unbreak></color> time(s). This tally resets at the start of the enemy target's turn.

anomaly.name: Interference
anomaly.effect: After the enemy target uses an attack, randomly causes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.05%</unbreak></color> or <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.1%</unbreak></color> action delay to the attacked target.

anomaly.name: Sunder
anomaly.effect: When ally targets are being attacked by enemies, the "Sunder" effect will be inflicted on them. Each stack additionally causes the holder to lose HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of their Max HP. This effect can be stacked indefinitely and cannot be dissipated. After targets with "Sunder" received a Shield from an ally target other than themselves or healing, all "Sunder" effects are dispelled on both targets.

anomaly.name: Interference
anomaly.effect: After the enemy target uses an attack, randomly causes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.05%</unbreak></color> or <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.1%</unbreak></color> action delay to the attacked target.

anomaly.name: Confinement
anomaly.effect: Ally targets initially obtain <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>2</unbreak></color> stack(s) of this effect, with each stack decreasing their own DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.1%</unbreak></color>. This effect cannot be dispelled, and 1 stack is removed after each Ultimate used.

buffs.name: Beaming with Joy
buffs.effect: Increases Elation for all allies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.4%</unbreak></color>. When an Aha Instant ends, all ally characters regenerate <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.1%</unbreak></color> Energy.

buffs.name: Add Insult to Injury
buffs.effect: After an enemy target is hit by an ally's Follow-Up ATK, DMG taken by them increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.15%</unbreak></color> for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>2</unbreak></color> turn(s). This effect can stack up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>4</unbreak></color> time(s).

buffs.name: Logistics Boost
buffs.effect: Increases all ally targets' DMG dealt by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.4%</unbreak></color> and increases ally's Alloy Pommy's SPD by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.5%</unbreak></color>.

anomaly.name: Sunder+
anomaly.effect: When ally targets are being attacked by enemies, the "Sunder+" effect will be inflicted on them. Each stack additionally causes the holder to lose HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of their Max HP. This effect can be stacked indefinitely and cannot be dissipated. After targets with "Sunder+" received a Shield from an ally target other than themselves or healing, all "Sunder+" effects are dispelled on both targets.

anomaly.name: Interference+
anomaly.effect: After the enemy target uses an attack, randomly causes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.05%</unbreak></color> or <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.2%</unbreak></color> action delay to the attacked target.

anomaly.name: Confinement++
anomaly.effect: Ally targets initially obtain <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>2</unbreak></color> stack(s) of this effect, with each stack decreasing their own DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.3%</unbreak></color>. This effect cannot be dispelled, and 1 stack is removed after each Ultimate used.

buffs.name: Add Insult to Injury
buffs.effect: After an enemy target is hit by an ally's Follow-Up ATK, DMG taken by them increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.15%</unbreak></color> for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>2</unbreak></color> turn(s). This effect can stack up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>4</unbreak></color> time(s).

buffs.name: Logistics Boost
buffs.effect: Increases all ally targets' DMG dealt by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.4%</unbreak></color> and increases ally's Alloy Pommy's SPD by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.5%</unbreak></color>.
